contract.title: Lot 3 on Plan PS907394U, Volume 12516 Folio 468
contract.owners_corporation: OC1 covers Common Property 1 + Lots 7–14. OC2 covers Common Property 1 + Lots 8–14. Lot 3 (this property) is NOT listed in either OC. Plan note says lots 'may' be affected — conveyancer must confirm Lot 3 is definitively excluded. If excluded: no levies, no rules, no governance. If included: quarterly fees + OC governance apply.
contract_watchpoints: The subdivision plan shows Common Property No. 1, which may conflict with the hard filter of no shared driveway/body corporate.
Section 32 pages are scanned/image-only, so full text extraction was not possible without OCR.
Telephone services are marked as not connected; confirm NBN/telecom availability.
The vendor is a developer/corporate vendor; inspect build quality and warranty position carefully.

pre_visit_confidence: high for layout and visuals; medium overall because legal structure is unresolved
next_action: Inspect Saturday only if the common-property question is acceptable; ask agent/conveyancer whether this violates the no-body-corporate rule.
